community.title: MobiFlight back from AERO2026
content: The MobiFlight team is back from AERO2026, where we had an amazing time connecting with the aviation community.
**We want to thank everyone** who stopped by our booth and shared their passion for flight simulation with us!

media.alt: Meet the MobiFlight team at AERO2026

community.title: Flight Sim Awards 2026
content: MobiFlight received the community award at the Flight Sim Awards 2026, recognizing our contributions to the flight simulation community.
**We are honored and grateful for this recognition!**

media.alt: MobiFlight receiving the community award at Flight Sim Awards 2026
